overall_summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a massive architectural transformation with the consolidation of the cloud and plugin monorepos, alongside a significant market valuation surge of up to 130%. Development focus has shifted toward infrastructure hardening, secure secrets management via @elizaos/vault, and preparation for the ElizaOS V3 launch.
key_facts: PR #7235 merged on May 3, consolidating cloud and plugin repositories while removing legacy Rust and Python components.
ElizaOS token (V3) experienced price gains ranging from 90% to 130% from recent lows on May 4.
The @elizaos/vault package was introduced to provide cross-platform secrets management using AES-256-GCM and OS-native keychains.
Major AI platforms including ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude reportedly praised the elizaOS architecture based on its public GitHub code.
PR #7375 migrated the @elizaos/plugin-slack into the monorepo, centralizing 11 actions and 3 providers.
Support for monetized container app domains, including Cloudflare management and route ownership, was enabled via PR #7376.
A critical runtime crash on headless Linux servers was resolved by skipping OS keychain services when unavailable (PR #7230).
Dependency updates for TypeScript (v6) and Hono are underway to modernize the technology stack.
A standalone spot trading agent for SOL and SUI is under development, targeting 1-2 signals per week.
Modititoring of Discord revealed issues with Nigerian bot spam and low liquidity for the elizaOS token on Solana.
open_questions: What happened to cause the price movement?
I bought elizaOs on Solana, I'm confused about the low liquidity on there?

new_issues_prs.author: Sw4pIO
new_issues_prs.significance: Resolved a critical bug causing inconsistent bot responses.

overall_focus.claim: Modernizing core infrastructure including upgrades to TypeScript 6 and Bun, and migrating build architectures to ESM-first standards.

discord_updates.summary: High engagement regarding the V3 price surge (90-130%). Discussions focused on transitioning elizaOS from a 'memecoin' to essential AI infrastructure. Technical praise from major LLM providers was a key sentiment driver.
Shaw articulated that token holders are not traditional investors and the project prioritizes revenue-generating products over short-term buybacks.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users expressed significant concern regarding low liquidity for the elizaOS token on the Solana network.
Community members highlighted a technical knowledge gap between core developers and the general community, requesting clearer communication.

strategic_insights.insight: The project is aggressively positioning itself as a legitimate B2B/developer platform (Eliza Cloud, V3) to escape the volatility and stigma of the memecoin market.
implications_or_questions: How will the community of 'speculators' react when revenue is prioritized over token aesthetics?
Can the marketing plan for V3 effectively bridge the developer-user knowledge gap?

market_analysis.observation: V3 price movement of 90-130% gains; comparisons drawn to competitor project Zerebro's 600% returns.
market_analysis.relevance: Drives community sentiment and developer interest but increases pressure for immediate delivery.
